channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Common Walking Mistakes (and How to Fix Them)
item.description: Walking is an excellent low-impact exercise. However, improper footwear, pace, or routine can hinder progress and potentially cause injury.

item.title: 11 Ways to Lower Your Cortisol Levels Naturally
Can Yogurt Help Prevent Colon Cancer?
Why Pfizer Is Looking East for Its Next Generation of Cancer Drugs
item.description: Pfizer has invested $650 million upfront in a collaboration with Innovent Biologics, potentially reaching $10.5 billion in total value.
